Legalisation made simple.

We handle all your paperwork — from your NIF to your residence permit — in a single point of contact. One team, one process, no surprises.

How it works

Four steps, one team.

A simple, predictable process, from first contact to resolution.

01

Contact

Tell us your case. We reply within 24 hours.

02

Assessment

Review of your documents and legal situation.

03

Process

We handle everything — applications, appointments, filings.

04

Resolution

We follow through to the final result.

In three weeks I had my NIF, my tax address and my residence application submitted. I never thought it could be this simple.
Ana R. · Brazilian national · Lisbon

We work with the main public authorities
